news.t: Defiance Launches LUNL: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Intuitive Machines, Inc.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long LUNR ETF (LUNL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Intuitive Machines, Inc. (NASDAQ: LUNR), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. LUNL was launched on Jan 12, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches LUNL: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Intuitive Machines, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, Jan. 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long LUNR ETF (LUNL) , expanding its suite of single-stock leveraged ETFs designed for...
